title: nebula inventory
description: Single source of truth for all machines in the nebula fleet. Each key must match the machine's hostname (e.g. testbed, pluto). This allows colmena apply-local to auto-detect the host without extra flags. The root flake reads this file to build nixosConfigurations and the Colmena hive.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference URI. Used by VS Code for validation and autocompletion.

machines.description: Map of machine key → machine definition. The key must match the machine's hostname — colmena apply-local auto-detects the running machine by hostname and looks up this map. When you need a second testbed, use a distinct hostname (e.g. testbed2) and add a new entry.

hostname.description: Hostname set on the machine via networking.hostName. Also determines the hosts/<hostname>/ directory used for hardware-configuration.nix and per-machine overrides.

description.description: Human-readable description of this machine's purpose. Shown in fleet dashboards.

address.description: Static IP address used for SSH and Colmena deployment. Assign a static DHCP lease or configure networking.interfaces in the role. Examples: 192.168.50.200, 10.0.1.5

tags.description: Colmena deployment tags. Target a group with: colmena apply --on @tagname. Also used for Grafana/Prometheus instance labels.

admin.description: Admin (wheel) users. The first entry is the primary operator: used by Colmena as targetUser, by home-manager as the managed user, and by NixOS as the primaryUser module arg.

regular.description: Non-admin users created on the machine.

os.description: Operating system and software composition for this machine.

type.description: OS type. Determines which management tool applies: Colmena for nixos, Ansible for everything else.

system.description: Nix system string. Required for nixos machines. Passed directly to nixpkgs.hostPlatform.

role.description: Role flake name from roles/. Defines the software personality: disk layout, services, user config, desktop if applicable. Maps to inputs.<role>.nixosModules.default.

modules.description: Additional composable feature modules from modules/ layered on top of the role. Each maps to inputs.<module>.nixosModules.default.

hardware.description: Physical or virtual hardware facts. Influences disk layout via disko and kernel module selection via hardware-configuration.nix.

form.description: Form factor. Used for Grafana inventory labels and future hardware-profile selection. VMs set this to vm — they require no microcode or firmware declarations.

disk.description: Primary disk configuration consumed by the role's disko layout.

device.description: Block device path. VMs typically use /dev/vda (virtio) or /dev/sda. Physical NVMe drives use /dev/nvme0n1.

swap.description: Swap partition size. Rule of thumb: match physical RAM for hibernate support, half RAM otherwise. Set by Terraform at provision time when RAM is known.

format.description: Root filesystem format used by disko. Defaults to xfs.
